title: Sunset Pass
writer: Zane Grey, Gerald Geraghty, Jack Cunningham

plot: An agent for the Cattlemens Association goes undercover to prison to try to find out who's behind a cattle-rustling gang. When he finds out, he "escapes" from prison and gets in touch with the gang's contact man and manages to joi...
